title: microsorum baithoense
intro: Microsorum baithoense, also known as Thai fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microsorum baithoense include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. It is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be dried and made into capsules or tablets for easier consumption.
